# Quantum communication, measurement and computing (QCMC) : the ninth international conference, Calgary, Canada, 19-24 August 2008

Contributors: lvovsky, alexander, international conference on quantum communication, measurement, and computing
Date: 2009
Subjects: quantum computers, quantum optics, quantum electronics, congresses, optical communications

"QCMC, Calgary, 2008." "Ninth International Conference on Quantum Communication, Measurement and Computing (QCMC)"--P. xiii. Includes bibliographical references and index. Also available via the World Wide Web.
